title: paeonia officinalis var. microcarpa
intro: Paeonia officinalis var. microcarpa, also known as the small-fruited peony, is a plant species belonging to the Paeoniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia officinalis var. microcarpa include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. Paeonia officinalis var. microcarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
